text.title: manifest-then-fetch Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for manifest-then-fetch as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Returning the manifest AND the full body "in case the agent needs it".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defeats the whole protocol — the body is in context the moment it returns, regardless of what the agent does next.

failure-mode.description: Letting the preview grow to several KB "to be safe".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Equivalent to inlining the body: the protocol's whole point is keeping the LLM-facing payload tiny.
